text: Technology Centre — MSAJCE aims to make students deployable and equip them with emerging industrial demands through various Technology Centres established in 2019-2020. These centres educate, train, and up-skill students in niche technologies, designed based on recommendations of AICTE and India Skill Report 2020.

Industry partners include Automation Anywhere, Godrej Inc, Ford, Palo Alto Systems, Amazon Web Services, National Instruments, CISCO Academy, Altair, Open Wave Computing, Levergent Technologies, and Propeller Technologies.

Centres include: 1. Centre for 3D Printing and Additive Manufacturing 2. Centre for CAE 3. Centre for Industrial Robotics 4. Centre for NDT – Non Destructive Testing 5. Centre for Building Information Modelling.

Centres include: 1. Centre for Embedded & IoT 2. Centre for UAV/Drone Technology 3. Godrej Disha Skill Development Centre 4. Centre for Bosch Industry Institute Collaboration 5. Centre for E-Mobility 6. Centre for Renewable Energy 7. APJ Abdul Kalam Innovation Centre.
Centres include: 1. Centre for Bot Lab & Robotics Process Automation 2. Centre for Cisco Networking Academy 3. Centre for Code Tantra – Coding Learning Centre 4. Centre for Gaming and AR/VR.
MSAJCE partnered with Automation Anywhere to establish the AAU powered Bot Lab that provides training in RPA, which automates business processes.

metadata.topic: RPA Bot Lab — Robotics Process Automation

text: Students will learn to explain Automation Anywhere Enterprise Platform, create bots, and apply bot creation methodologies.
Students will be able to automate tasks, deploy software bots, and build IQ bots to solve real-world problems.
Students gain access to the Automation Anywhere Enterprise Platform, globally-recognized certifications, and placement assistance.
MSAJCE has partnered with CISCO to provide hands-on learning in networking, security, and cloud technologies through the Networking Academy.
Students will understand computer networks, IP addressing, and use Packet Tracer to analyze network operations.
Students will configure LANs, troubleshoot routers, and design enterprise networks using simulation tools.
Courses include Network Essentials, CCNA: Introduction to Networks, CCNA: Switching, Routing, and Wireless Essentials, among others.

metadata.topic: Courses Offered by CISCO Networking Academy

text: Students will gain skills in 3D printing technologies, material selection, and digital manufacturing processes.

metadata.topic: Objectives of Centre for 3D Printing and Additive Manufacturing

text: Students will develop CAD models for 3D printing and learn to produce products using 3D Printing or Additive Manufacturing.

metadata.topic: Outcomes of Centre for 3D Printing and Additive Manufacturing

text: Students will learn to build IT infrastructure on AWS and understand various cloud services provided by AWS.

metadata.topic: Objectives of Amazon Web Services (AWS) & Cloud Computing Centre

text: Students will create and configure AWS services and architect optimal IT solutions.

metadata.topic: Outcomes of AWS & Cloud Computing Centre

text: Students will learn cybersecurity concepts, network defense, and next-generation cybersecurity solutions.

metadata.topic: Objectives of Cyber Security Academy — Palo Alto Systems

text: Students will formulate designs to protect infrastructure and demonstrate knowledge of interconnected technology.
Students will learn IoT architectures, related protocols, and develop IoT systems using Arduino and Raspberry Pi.
Students will analyze IoT protocols and develop an IoT system prototype.
Students will learn robotics components, programming, and participate in competitions.

metadata.topic: Objectives of e-Yantra & Code Tantra Coding Learning Centre

text: Students will design, develop, program, and test robots and software applications.

metadata.topic: Outcomes of e-Yantra & Code Tantra Coding Learning Centre

text: Objectives include learning technical and design aspects of AR and VR, and creating 3D designs for various applications.
Students will gain theoretical knowledge and practical skills of BIM techniques and understand the National Building Code.
The RAISE CoE at MSAJCE was established to foster innovation in emerging technologies.

metadata.topic: RAISE Centre of Excellence — MIT Square London

text: Students will have opportunities for internships, international exposure, and participation in various tech events.

metadata.topic: Benefits of RAISE Centre of Excellence

text: The MSAJCE Technology Centres contribute significantly to student skill development and industry readiness through structured programs and collaborations.
